name: NERDWALLET, INC.
business: NerdWallet, Inc. provides consumers and small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs) with trusted guidance across a broad range of finance topics through a digital platform that integrates independent editorial content, comparison tools, data-driven product marketplaces, and access to regulated financial services offered through its subsidiaries. The company generates revenue primarily through referral fees, lead generation, and partner-based monetization, as well as through revenue derived from brokering and advisory services.

exposures.sentence: NerdWallet, Inc. provides consumers and small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs) with trusted guidance across a broad range of finance topics through a digital platform that integrates independent editorial content, comparison tools, data-driven product marketplaces, and access to regulated financial services offered through our subsidiaries.
Insurance Marketplace (NerdWallet Insurance Services, Inc.) Provides quote comparison tools and introductions to carriers and licensed insurance professionals.
We use machine learning and rules-based systems to improve marketplace matching, predict user intent, and optimize performance for both users and partners.
